title: Background Tasks
description: Long-running work moves to a thread while the agent keeps the main loop responsive.

steps.content: Run a long repository scan and tell me when it finishes.
steps.annotation: The user asks for work that may exceed the normal foreground loop.

steps.content: I'll start the scan in the background so we can keep the conversation responsive.
steps.annotation: The model chooses the background path instead of blocking on the tool result.
The tool call is wrapped with a background flag.
The runtime starts a thread and returns immediately.
A placeholder result is appended to the main conversation.
The completed thread injects a notification back into the next loop.

steps.content: The scan finished with 12 matches. I'll summarize the most important ones now.
steps.annotation: The agent consumes the background result as fresh context.
